files.summary: StepQueue lifecycle, POST /api/execute runtime switch (AGENTS_RUNTIME), SSE streaming, Location header semantics, and abort cleanup.
StepQueue class orchestrates workflows, resume support, and emits step results via runWorkflow.
LangGraph runner uses StepQueue, updates executions store (update/complete/fail), and cleans up abort signals.
In-memory executions store backing create/update/complete/fail status responses for /api/executions.
Session abort signal registry with createAbortSignal and cleanupAbortSignal used by orchestrator flow.
Feature-flagged adapter inspects AGENTS_RUNTIME and mirrors 202 Location response shape.

insert_points.description: Replace local StepQueue.create() + handler registration with orchestrator service client bootstrap (remote queue).
Ensure POST /api/execute preserves 202 + Location=/api/executions/:id semantics when delegating to orchestrator service.
Current in-process stepQueue.runWorkflow; future call should dispatch to orchestrator service API or queue.
Abort signal cleanup happens locally; orchestrator service needs a remote signal cleanup/teardown hook.
LangGraph runner updates executions store; extraction requires moving these updates behind orchestrator API.
updateExecution/completeExecution/failExecution become orchestrator service endpoints or RPC calls.
Feature flag guard for AGENTS_RUNTIME will route traffic to new orchestrator service client.

files.summary: runSingleExecution pipeline (file writes, sandbox run, repair loops) executed inside singleStepHandler.
planStepHandler/singleStepHandler registered with StepQueue before POST /api/execute.
runWorkflow invokes registered step handlers sequentially; runner service will host plan/single logic.

insert_points.description: Extract runSingleExecution into runner service API (Task 16+) and replace direct function body with remote call.
planStepHandler should dispatch to runner service planning endpoint instead of local runPlanning.
singleStepHandler currently runs execution locally; future implementation will enqueue runner service job.
StepQueue handler invocation boundary where remote runner responses must be translated back into StepExecutionResult.
